title: Rewards & Punishments
intro: Tiny actions deserve small wins, and a real cost holds them in place.
rewardsHint: Pick or type things you love. We pull from this list when you earn one.
punishmentsHint: When you skip a critical habit, one of these activates. Charity is the safe default if your list is empty.
criticalHint: Mark the habits where missing a day actually matters. These trigger a punishment.
noCriticalHabits: Mark a habit as critical from its detail page.
pendingEmpty: Earn one by finishing all of today's habits or hitting a 7 / 30 / 100-day streak.
activePunishmentsEmpty: Nothing owed. Stay consistent on your critical habits.

tierHint.small: Tiny dopamine the moment you finish all of today's habits.

noOptionAssigned: Your call — pick anything from this tier.

presets.diningOut: Dinner at a place you love
presets.newHobbyKit: A starter kit for a new hobby

punishmentPresets.charityDonation: Donate a small amount to charity
punishmentPresets.spiritualFastDay: A day of fasting — eyes, ears, hands, tongue, and food
punishmentPresets.autophagyFast: An autophagy fast — at least 16 hours, water only
punishmentPresets.earlyWakeup: Wake up an hour earlier tomorrow
punishmentPresets.noScreensEvening: No screens for the rest of the evening
punishmentPresets.writeApology: Write a sincere apology to someone you've wronged
punishmentPresets.extraQuran: Read an extra page of Quran with translation
punishmentPresets.silenceHour: An hour of silence — no talking, no media
punishmentPresets.handwritePages: Handwrite a page about why you missed today
punishmentPresets.noEntertainment: No movies, games or shows for 24 hours
punishmentPresets.chorePile: Tackle a chore you've been avoiding

defaultCharity: Donate a small amount to charity (the safe default).

safety.meal: Punishments must never involve skipping meals or starvation.
safety.extreme: Extreme exercise as punishment can cause real harm.
safety.sleep: Sleep deprivation is off the table — health goals come first.
safety.harm: Anything that causes self-harm is not allowed.

homeBannerBody: Loss-aversion holds habits in place. Add a few wins and a stickK-style cost.
